description_long: This house is a modern, multi-unit residential building with a linear layout and a flat, segmented roofline. The exterior features a mix of brick and concrete facades, interspersed with large windows and landscaped green spaces. The structure is divided into several connected units, each with its own entryway and private outdoor area, suggesting a townhouse or rowhouse configuration. The front of the building includes a driveway or parking area with a striped pattern, while the rear is bordered by additional greenery. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to each unit. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, multi-unit townhouse complex with flat roofs, brick facades, and landscaped outdoor areas. The building features large windows and a linear, segmented layout.
description_view_0: This view shows the long, linear facade with multiple entryways, brickwork, and landscaped areas in front.
description_view_1: From above, the segmented flat roofs and the central driveway or parking area are visible, along with the arrangement of green spaces.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the building reveals more brick facades, windows, and additional greenery, mirroring the front.
description_view_3: Looking from the rear, the private outdoor areas and the back entrances to the units are visible, along with the continuation of the flat roof segments.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small overhangs or porches, and are accessible via short walkways or steps.
